title: Raven's Idea
description: A mod added some fantasy idea and stuffs
body:
# 🌐English Introduction
I have integrated the audience's ideas and suggestions into this mod, and synchronized updates of the mod's related videos to [Bilibili](https://space.bilibili.com/3546795212802660/upload/video) to showcase its content and gameplay. This mod will continue to be updated along with my videos

## 🔗External Links
📹[My Bilibili](https://space.bilibili.com/3546795212802660/upload/video)  💴[My afdian](https://afdian.com/a/raven591?tab=home)




## **--------------------------------Dividing Line----------------------------**




# 🌐中文介绍
我把观众的想法和建议整合起来加入进了此模组当中，并且同步更新模组的相关视频至[哔哩哔哩](https://space.bilibili.com/3546795212802660/upload/video)，以展示模组的内容和玩法，此模组将和我的视频持续更新

## 🔗相关链接
📹[我的哔哩哔哩](https://space.bilibili.com/3546795212802660/upload/video)  💴[我的爱发电](https://afdian.com/a/raven591?tab=home)
